briefdescription.para: Register a process with the diagnostic manager.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the process to register

briefdescription.para: Get diagnostic registry for a specific process (returns pointer to internal registry)
Remove a process from the diagnostic manager.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the process to remove

briefdescription.para: Collect diagnostics from a specific process.

memberdef.argsstring: (this, process_name, field_name, scalar_value, array_1d_ptr, array_2d_ptr, array_3d_ptr, data_type, description, units, rc)
memberdef.name: get_field_value

briefdescription.para: Get diagnostic field value for validation purposes.

parameterdescription.para: Optional field description for NetCDF metadata
Optional field units for NetCDF metadata

briefdescription.para: Get total number of diagnostics across all processes.

simplesect.para: total_diagnostics Total number of registered diagnostics

detaileddescription.para: This type manages all process-specific diagnostic registries and provides centralized diagnostic collection, output, and management integrated with the CATChem framework.
